metadata.description: Nuclear war target coordinates for NATO Europe (Russian strikes) and China (US strikes)
sources: US Air Force China Aerospace Studies Institute

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Buchel Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: German Tornado wing, 10-15 B61-12 bombs. F-35A arriving 2027.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Kleine Brogel Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: Belgian 10th Tactical Wing F-16s, ~20 B61 nuclear bombs.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Volkel Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: Dutch F-35A squadrons (312 & 313), ~22 B61 bombs. 703rd MUNSS.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Aviano Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: USAF 31st FW, 20-30 B61-12 bombs for US F-16C/D delivery.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Ghedi Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: Italian PA-200 Tornados, 10-15 B61-12 bombs. F-35A transition.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: Incirlik Air Base
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: USAF/Turkish joint base, 20-30 B61-12 bombs. Strategic eastern flank.

nuclear_sharing_bases.name: RAF Lakenheath
nuclear_sharing_bases.desc: USAF 48th FW F-15E/F-35A. Nuclear mission reactivated, vaults upgraded.

nato_military_hq.name: SHAPE (Supreme HQ Allied Powers Europe)
nato_military_hq.desc: NATO's military HQ at Casteau near Mons. SACEUR commands all NATO ops.

nato_military_hq.name: NATO HQ Brussels
nato_military_hq.desc: NATO political headquarters, North Atlantic Council.

nato_military_hq.name: JFC Brunssum
nato_military_hq.desc: Allied Joint Force Command Brunssum. Operational-level HQ.

nato_military_hq.name: JFC Naples (Lago Patria)
nato_military_hq.desc: Allied Joint Force Command Naples. Southern flank operations.

nato_military_hq.name: MARCOM Northwood
nato_military_hq.desc: Allied Maritime Command. NATO's one-stop shop for maritime ops.

nato_military_hq.name: AIRCOM Ramstein
nato_military_hq.desc: Allied Air Command. Prime air/space advisor to the Alliance.

nato_military_hq.name: NATO Joint Warfare Centre Stavanger
nato_military_hq.desc: JWC Jatta, subordinate to HQ SACT. Training and exercises.

uk_nuclear_facilities.name: HMNB Clyde (Faslane)
uk_nuclear_facilities.desc: Home of UK Vanguard-class Trident SSBNs. Britain's continuous at-sea deterrent.

uk_nuclear_facilities.name: RNAD Coulport
uk_nuclear_facilities.desc: Trident warhead storage/loading facility. 16 hillside bunkers on Loch Long.

uk_nuclear_facilities.name: AWE Aldermaston
uk_nuclear_facilities.desc: Nuclear warhead research, design & manufacturing. 750-acre site.

uk_nuclear_facilities.name: AWE Burghfield
uk_nuclear_facilities.desc: Warhead assembly, maintenance & decommissioning. 225-acre site near Reading.

uk_nuclear_facilities.name: HMNB Devonport
uk_nuclear_facilities.desc: Largest naval base in Western Europe. Sole UK nuclear sub repair/refuel facility.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: Ile Longue Submarine Base
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Base of 4 Triomphant-class SSBNs (FOST). France's sea-based nuclear deterrent.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: Saint-Dizier Air Base (BA 113)
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Nuclear-capable Rafale BF3 squadrons (Gascogne & La Fayette). ASMP-A missiles.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: Istres-Le Tube Air Base (BA 125)
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Large multi-role base. Nuclear weapon dispersal/storage site for carrier aviation.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: CEA Valduc
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Nuclear warhead production, maintenance, storage & dismantlement. France's Pantex.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: CEA Bruyeres-le-Chatel (DAM-DIF)
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Warhead design & simulation. Houses Tera 1000 supercomputer, 30km south of Paris.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: CEA CESTA (Le Barp)
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Nuclear weapon/reentry vehicle design. Hosts Laser Megajoule facility.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: Toulon Naval Base
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Principal French Navy base. Charles de Gaulle carrier, nuclear attack subs.

french_nuclear_facilities.name: Arsenal de Brest
french_nuclear_facilities.desc: Major French naval facility near Ile Longue. Submarine support infrastructure.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Ramstein Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Largest US air base in Europe. USAFE-AFAFRICA HQ. 54,000 personnel community.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Spangdahlem Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: USAF 52nd FW. SEAD missions, nuclear security ops across 4 countries.

major_nato_air_bases.name: RAF Mildenhall
major_nato_air_bases.desc: USAF 100th ARW aerial refueling. Strategic airlift hub.

major_nato_air_bases.name: RAF Fairford
major_nato_air_bases.desc: USAF forward operating base. B-52/B-2 bomber deployments.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Lajes Field (Azores)
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Mid-Atlantic staging base. Strategic between North America and Europe.

major_nato_air_bases.name: NAS Sigonella
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Hub of the Med. Global Hawk UAVs, maritime patrol. US 6th Fleet support.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Naval Station Rota
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Largest US military community in Spain. Aegis BMD destroyers homeported.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Souda Bay NATO Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Largest NATO naval base in eastern Mediterranean. Greek/US/NATO joint.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Naval Base Kiel
major_nato_air_bases.desc: German Navy base. Baltic Sea operations.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Rygge Air Station
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Royal Norwegian Air Force. F-35A operations.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Amari Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Estonian AF base. NATO Baltic Air Policing.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Siauliai Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Lithuanian AF base. NATO Baltic Air Policing primary.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Lask Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Polish AF base. F-16 operations, NATO enhanced presence.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Deveselu Aegis Ashore
major_nato_air_bases.desc: US Aegis Ashore BMD site. SM-3 interceptors.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Redzikowo Aegis Ashore
major_nato_air_bases.desc: US Aegis Ashore BMD site. Activated 2024. SM-3 interceptors.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Grafenwohr Training Area
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Largest US Army training area in Europe. Major troop concentration.

major_nato_air_bases.name: Mihail Kogalniceanu Air Base
major_nato_air_bases.desc: Major US/NATO rotational force hub on Black Sea.

nato_capitals.name: Paris
nato_capitals.desc: French capital. EU's largest metro area.

nato_capitals.name: Berlin
nato_capitals.desc: German capital. Largest city in EU by population.

nato_capitals.name: Madrid
nato_capitals.desc: Spanish capital. Largest city in Spain.

nato_capitals.name: Warsaw
nato_capitals.desc: Polish capital. NATO eastern flank anchor.

nato_capitals.name: Bucharest
nato_capitals.desc: Romanian capital. Black Sea region anchor.

nato_capitals.name: Brussels
nato_capitals.desc: Belgian capital. NATO and EU headquarters city.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Istanbul
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Largest city in Europe. Bosphorus strait control.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Naples
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Southern Italy hub. Near NATO JFC Naples.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Hamburg
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Germany's largest port. Major logistics hub.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Birmingham
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: UK's second city. Major manufacturing center.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Marseille
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: France's second city. Major Mediterranean port.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Seville
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Southern Spain. Moron Air Base nearby.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Thessaloniki
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Greece's second city. NATO logistics hub.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Rotterdam
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Europe's largest port. Critical logistics node.

major_cities_500k_plus.name: Izmir
major_cities_500k_plus.desc: Turkey's third city. Aegean coast. Former NATO AIRCOM site.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Yumen Silo Field (Base 64)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: 120 silos for solid-fuel ICBMs. 1,110 km2 area. Construction began March 2020. Western Theater.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Hami Silo Field (Base 64)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: 110 silos. 1,028 km2 area. Eastern Xinjiang. Security gates at 42.46N/92.35E and 42.34N/92.80E.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Hanggin Banner/Ordos Silo Field (Base 65)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: 90 silos. 832 km2. Inner Mongolia, Northern Theater. Different dome pattern.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Jilantai Training Area
icbm_silo_fields.desc: PLARF training site. 16 silos, 2,090 km2. 5 missile types train here (DF-41, DF-31AG, DF-26, DF-21).

icbm_silo_fields.name: Sundian/Checunzhen (DF-5 silos, Base 66)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: Legacy DF-5 silo area, Henan Province. Additional silos under construction at 662 Brigade.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Jingxian (DF-5 expansion)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: New DF-5 silos constructed since 2017. Anhui Province.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Yueyang (DF-5 expansion)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: New DF-5 silos since 2017. Hunan Province.

icbm_silo_fields.name: Luanchuan (662 Brigade, Base 66)
icbm_silo_fields.desc: DF-4/DF-5A/B silo site. Potentially upgrading to DF-41.

mobile_icbm_bases.name: Nanyang (663 Brigade, Base 66)
mobile_icbm_bases.desc: First DF-31A brigade. Road-mobile ICBM. Henan Province.

mobile_icbm_bases.name: Yiyang (664 Brigade, Base 66)
mobile_icbm_bases.desc: Possibly upgrading to DF-31AG. Henan Province.

mobile_icbm_bases.name: Tonghua (655 Brigade)
mobile_icbm_bases.desc: Rumored new brigade base area. Jilin Province, near North Korea border.

mobile_icbm_bases.name: Hanzhong (Base 63 area)
mobile_icbm_bases.desc: PLARF base area in Shaanxi. DF-31/DF-41 units. Mountain terrain for concealment.

mobile_icbm_bases.name: Luoyang (Base 66 HQ)
mobile_icbm_bases.desc: Headquarters of Base 66. Commands multiple ICBM brigades in Henan.

submarine_bases.name: Yulin/Longpo Naval Base
submarine_bases.desc: South Sea Fleet. Underground pens for 20 subs. 6 Type 094 Jin-class SSBNs. Hainan Island.

submarine_bases.name: Jianggezhuang Naval Base
submarine_bases.desc: Submarine Base No.1. Underground tunnel complex. Near Qingdao. Type 092/091 subs. 12-story cavern.

submarine_bases.name: Qingdao Naval Base (North Sea Fleet HQ)
submarine_bases.desc: North Sea Fleet headquarters. Major surface/submarine fleet concentration.

bomber_bases.name: Neixiang Air Base (106th Air Brigade)
bomber_bases.desc: Only H-6N nuclear bomber base. 20 H-6K/N bombers. ALBM-capable. Underground shelters.

bomber_bases.name: Xi'an Yanliang (XAC/CFTE)
bomber_bases.desc: H-6 manufacturing/test facility. Xi'an Aircraft Industrial Corp. Chinese Flight Test Establishment.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Mianyang/CAEP (Science City)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: China Academy of Engineering Physics. Primary nuclear warhead design lab. 12 research institutes.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: CAEP 903 Factory (Pingwu County)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: Nuclear warhead fabrication facility. ~100km NW of Mianyang in mountains.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Lanzhou Enrichment Plant (Plant 504)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: China's largest uranium enrichment facility. GDP operational 1964, now centrifuge plants (CEP1-5).

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Guangyuan Nuclear Complex (Plant 821)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: Plutonium production reactor complex. Northern Sichuan. Part of Third Line dispersal.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Heping GDP (Plant 814, Jinkouhe)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: Second HEU production facility. Leshan area, Sichuan. Operated 1970-1987 for weapons HEU.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Baotou Nuclear Fuel Plant (Plant 202)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: Nuclear fuel component fabrication. Inner Mongolia. Uranium/plutonium processing.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Jiuquan Atomic Energy Complex (Plant 404)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: Plutonium production & reprocessing. Near Yumen. Part of original weapons complex.

nuclear_weapons_facilities.name: Taibai County Warhead Storage (Baoji)
nuclear_weapons_facilities.desc: PLARF central warhead handling and storage facility. Shaanxi mountains.

command_and_control.name: Zhongnanhai
command_and_control.desc: CPC/PRC central leadership compound. Adjacent to Forbidden City. Xi Jinping's office/residence.

command_and_control.name: Western Hills Command Center (Xishan)
command_and_control.desc: Underground nuclear command bunker. Built 1950s with USSR aid. Mentougou District.

command_and_control.name: Beijing Military City (Qinglonghu)
command_and_control.desc: New massive command center under construction since mid-2024. 1,500 acres. 10x Pentagon size. Replaces Western Hills.

command_and_control.name: August 1st Building (Bayi Building)
command_and_control.desc: Central Military Commission headquarters. PLA General Staff Department. Central Beijing.

command_and_control.name: PLA Strategic Support Force HQ
command_and_control.desc: Space, cyber, electronic warfare command. Central Beijing.

cities_over_2m.name: Shanghai
cities_over_2m.desc: Financial center. Largest city proper. Jiangnan Shipyard.

cities_over_2m.name: Beijing
cities_over_2m.desc: National capital. PLA command centers. Central government.

cities_over_2m.name: Chongqing
cities_over_2m.desc: Largest municipality. Southwestern industrial hub. Defense manufacturing.

cities_over_2m.name: Chengdu
cities_over_2m.desc: Western Theater Command HQ. Chengdu J-20 production. CAEP nearby.

cities_over_2m.name: Guangzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Southern Theater Command HQ. Pearl River Delta manufacturing hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Shenzhen
cities_over_2m.desc: Tech capital. Adjacent to Hong Kong. Major electronics/semiconductor hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Wuhan
cities_over_2m.desc: Central China hub. Major rail/river junction. Heavy industry and biotech.

cities_over_2m.name: Tianjin
cities_over_2m.desc: Beijing's port city. Major industrial/petrochemical center.

cities_over_2m.name: Xi'an
cities_over_2m.desc: Aerospace/defense center. XAC H-6 production. AVIC headquarters.

cities_over_2m.name: Suzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Major manufacturing center. Electronics and semiconductors.

cities_over_2m.name: Zhengzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Henan capital. Central rail hub. Near PLARF Base 66 units.

cities_over_2m.name: Hangzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Zhejiang capital. Tech hub (Alibaba). Eastern Theater.

cities_over_2m.name: Shijiazhuang
cities_over_2m.desc: Hebei capital. Near Beijing military support zone.

cities_over_2m.name: Dongguan
cities_over_2m.desc: Pearl River Delta manufacturing powerhouse.

cities_over_2m.name: Qingdao
cities_over_2m.desc: North Sea Fleet HQ. Submarine base. Major Yellow Sea port.

cities_over_2m.name: Changsha
cities_over_2m.desc: Hunan capital. Defense industry and education center.

cities_over_2m.name: Hefei
cities_over_2m.desc: Anhui capital. Growing tech/semiconductor hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Nanjing
cities_over_2m.desc: Eastern Theater Command HQ. Major military/political significance.

cities_over_2m.name: Jinan
cities_over_2m.desc: Shandong capital. Northern Theater support.

cities_over_2m.name: Shenyang
cities_over_2m.desc: Northern Theater Command HQ. Shenyang Aircraft Corp (J-11/J-16).

cities_over_2m.name: Foshan
cities_over_2m.desc: Pearl River Delta manufacturing. Adjacent to Guangzhou.

cities_over_2m.name: Wenzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Zhejiang coast. Light manufacturing hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Ningbo
cities_over_2m.desc: Major deep-water port. Eastern coast logistics hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Nanning
cities_over_2m.desc: Guangxi capital. Near Vietnam border.

cities_over_2m.name: Harbin
cities_over_2m.desc: Heilongjiang capital. Near Russia. Heavy industry and aerospace.

cities_over_2m.name: Kunming
cities_over_2m.desc: Yunnan capital. Southern Theater air operations hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Changchun
cities_over_2m.desc: Jilin capital. Automotive and satellite manufacturing.

cities_over_2m.name: Fuzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Fujian capital. Taiwan Strait frontline logistics.

cities_over_2m.name: Dalian
cities_over_2m.desc: Major naval port. Dalian Shipbuilding (aircraft carriers, destroyers).

cities_over_2m.name: Nanchang
cities_over_2m.desc: Jiangxi capital. AVIC Hongdu Aviation (L-15, CJ-6 trainers).

cities_over_2m.name: Guiyang
cities_over_2m.desc: Guizhou capital. Defense electronics and aerospace.

cities_over_2m.name: Lanzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Gansu capital. Uranium enrichment plant. Western logistics hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Urumqi
cities_over_2m.desc: Xinjiang capital. Western military staging. Near Hami silo field.

cities_over_2m.name: Taiyuan
cities_over_2m.desc: Shanxi capital. Taiyuan Satellite Launch Center nearby.

cities_over_2m.name: Wuxi
cities_over_2m.desc: Major semiconductor and electronics manufacturing hub.

cities_over_2m.name: Xuzhou
cities_over_2m.desc: Major rail junction. Strategic crossroads in Jiangsu.

cities_over_2m.name: Tangshan
cities_over_2m.desc: Steel production capital. North China industry.

cities_over_2m.name: Xiamen
cities_over_2m.desc: Fujian coast. Directly across from Taiwan-held Kinmen islands.

cities_over_2m.name: Zhuhai
cities_over_2m.desc: Adjacent to Macau. China Airshow host. Defense industry showcase.

cities_over_2m.name: Haikou
cities_over_2m.desc: Hainan capital. Southern military infrastructure support.

cities_over_2m.name: Lhasa
cities_over_2m.desc: Tibet capital. Growing PLARF missile presence on Tibetan Plateau.
